subject: Distilled references: avoiding your hook-policy/RULES claim
body: Prismatic Transiting Star is taking a narrow docs/fitness slice for the owner's distilled.md request: session-handoff knowledge-conservation routing, live docs wording, and practice-fitness discovery coverage. I see your active Lane B claim owns .agent/hooks/policy.json and RULES_INDEX.md, so I will not edit those files. Note: hook policy still contains old distilled.md citations for explicit-pathspec staging; if your Lane B bundle touches that area, the current permanent home is .agent/rules/stage-by-explicit-pathspec.md.
